With.Name: Main
With.Cte: SELECT DISTINCT DailyStocksIntervalsCte.ProductId, DailyStocksIntervalsCte.PointOfSaleId, COALESCE(DailyStocksIntervalsCte.Quantity, 0) AS StockQuantity FROM DailyStocksIntervalsCte LEFT JOIN SalesIntervalsCte ON DailyStocksIntervalsCte.RootProductCode = SalesIntervalsCte.RootProductCode AND DailyStocksIntervalsCte.PointOfSaleId = SalesIntervalsCte.PointOfSaleId WHERE SalesIntervalsCte.RootProductCode IS NULL
SELECT ProductId, SUM(Isnull(WarehouseStock,0)) AS WarehouseStock FROM Fact.WarehouseStocks GROUP BY ProductId
SELECT PointOfSaleId, SUM(Quantity) AS LevelStockTotal, SUM(SUM(Quantity)) OVER() AS TotalOfLevelStockTotal FROM DailyStocksIntervalsCte GROUP BY PointOfSaleId

SELECT {{ Fields -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte -Dimension: PointsOfSale --Table: PointsOfSaleCte -WithComma }} {{ IfRequest -Expression: Stock --SUM(StockWithoutSalesCte.StockQuantity) AS Stock -Expression: WarehouseStock --SUM(WarehouseStocksCte.WarehouseStock) AS WarehouseStock -Expression: DaysInPointOfSale --MAX(DaysInPointsOfSale.DaysInPointOfSale) AS DaysInPointOfSale -Expression: TotalStockLevels --SUM(TotalStocksCte.LevelStockTotal) AS TotalStockLevels -Expression: ParticipationPercentage --CAST(100.0 * SUM(StockWithoutSalesCte.StockQuantity) / -- NULLIF(SUM(TotalStocksCte.LevelStockTotal), 0) AS decimal(10, 2) -- ) AS ParticipationPercentage -Expression: TotalOfLevelStockTotal --SUM(TotalStocksCte.TotalOfLevelStockTotal) AS TotalOfLevelStockTotal }} FROM StockWithoutSalesCte {{ InnerJoin -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte -Table: StockWithoutSalesCte -On: ProductId-ProductId }} {{ InnerJoin -Dimension: PointsOfSale --Table: PointsOfSaleCte -Table: StockWithoutSalesCte -On: PointOfSaleId-PointOfSaleId }} LEFT JOIN Fact.DaysInPointsOfSale ON StockWithoutSalesCte.ProductId = DaysInPointsOfSale.ProductId AND StockWithoutSalesCte.PointOfSaleId = DaysInPointsOfSale.PointOfSaleId LEFT JOIN WarehouseStocksCte ON StockWithoutSalesCte.ProductId = WarehouseStocksCte.ProductId LEFT JOIN TotalStocksCte ON StockWithoutSalesCte.PointOfSaleId = TotalStocksCte.PointOfSaleId {{ GroupBy -Dimension: Products --Table: ProductsCte -Dimension: PointsOfSale --Table: PointsOfSaleCte }}
With.Query: SELECT {{ Fields -Dimension: Products -Dimension: PointsOfSale -WithComma }} {{ IfRequest -Expression: Stock --Stock -Expression: WarehouseStock --WarehouseStock -Expression: DaysInPointOfSale --DaysInPointOfSale -Expression: TotalStockLevels --TotalStockLevels -Expression: ParticipationPercentage --ParticipationPercentage -Expression: TotalOfLevelStockTotal --TotalOfLevelStockTotal -WhenRequestTotals --Default ---COUNT(*) OVER () AS TotalCount --Expression: Stock ---SUM(Stock) OVER() AS TotalStock --Expression: WarehouseStock ---SUM(WarehouseStock) OVER() AS TotalWarehousStock --Expression: DaysInPointOfSale ---SUM(DaysInPointOfSale) OVER() AS TotalDaysInPointOfSale --Expression: ParticipationPercentage ---SUM(ParticipationPercentage) OVER() AS TotalParticipationPercentage --Expression: TotalStockLevels ---SUM(TotalStockLevels) OVER() AS TotalTotalStockLevels --Expression: TotalOfLevelStockTotal ---SUM(TotalOfLevelStockTotal) OVER() AS TotalTotalOfLevelStockTotal }} FROM StockWithoutSalesGroupedCte {{ OrderBy -Dimension: Products -Dimension: PointsOfSale -Required }} {{Pagination}}
